Catholic Archdioceses & Dioceses of Nigeria

About this List

The Catholic Church in Nigeria is organised into nine ecclesiastical provinces, each headed by a Metropolitan Archbishop, together with their suffragan Dioceses led by Bishops. This directory presents all 57 jurisdictions — 9 Archdioceses and 48 Dioceses — serving millions of the faithful across the federation. An Archdiocese is a principal see whose Archbishop presides over a province of neighbouring dioceses. Use the filters above to explore by type, province, or state, switch between the gallery, province, and table views, and download or print the directory.
